name: Input Sanitization & Validation
description: Implement comprehensive input validation and sanitization mechanisms to prevent injection attacks and ensure data integrity in AI systems.
implementation_guidance: Deploy multi-layer input validation including schema validation, content filtering, and anomaly detection. Implement allowlisting over denylisting where possible.

name: Model Inventory & Asset Management
description: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of all AI models, their versions, dependencies, and deployment locations.
implementation_guidance: Establish an AI asset register with metadata tracking including model lineage, training data sources, and performance metrics.

name: Graceful Degradation Mechanisms
description: Design systems to gracefully degrade functionality when AI components fail rather than experiencing catastrophic failure.
implementation_guidance: Implement fallback mechanisms, circuit breakers, and manual override capabilities for critical AI-driven decisions.

name: Continuous Model Monitoring
description: Establish real-time monitoring of model performance, drift detection, and anomaly identification.
implementation_guidance: Deploy automated monitoring dashboards tracking accuracy, latency, drift metrics, and adversarial patterns.

name: AI Security Training Program
description: Develop and deliver comprehensive AI security awareness and technical training for all stakeholders.
implementation_guidance: Create role-based training modules covering AI risks, secure development practices, and incident response procedures.

name: Prompt Injection Defense
description: Implement defenses against prompt injection attacks targeting large language models.
implementation_guidance: Deploy prompt validation, instruction separation, and output filtering to prevent malicious prompt manipulation.
